stemHtml: Dynamic hydroplaning is a condition that can occur when aircraft…

options.a: land on a surface with standing water deeper than the tread depth of the tyres.
options.b: land on wet runways and the fusible plugs melt due to braking inefficiency.
options.c: land on a surface with standing water about half the tread depth of the tyres.
options.d: use heavy braking, thereby resulting in a prolonged locked-wheel skid.
